case_title: TERRI L. KNIGHT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, TERRI L. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT CITY ATTORNEY: DENNIS HERRERA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-11-2012

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, TERRI L. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). **NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT(S), AND NO APPEARANCE AT THE MAY-14-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-26-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST TERRI L. KNIGHT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-26-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-11-2013. ***NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO TERRI L. KNIGHT IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE JAN-29-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $700.00.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-14-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST TERRI L. KNIGHT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-05-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-21-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
